title: wasm: missing pad/unpad breaks CLI interop
description: wasm/src/client.rs build_payload() never calls messages::pad() before encoding, and decode_payload_text() never calls messages::unpad() before JSON parsing. CLI always pads outgoing messages. Result: (1) WASM→CLI messages arrive as unpadded payloads that CLI may misparse; (2) CLI→WASM messages fail JSON parsing (padded bytes start with a 4-byte binary length prefix, not valid JSON), so all received chat text degrades to '(binary payload)'. WASM and CLI cannot communicate at all. Same bug exists in ffi/src/api/client.rs encode_chat_payload/decode_payload_text. Trigger: any WASM or FFI client talking to a CLI client.
